page_title: Visitor record: About the document - Canada.ca

h2: When to apply for a visitor record

sections.heading: When to apply for a visitor record
items: You must apply for a visitor record before your current status expires. If you’re not sure when your status expires, find out how long you can stay in Canada .

sections.heading: Leaving and returning to Canada
items: A visitor record is a document that allows you to stay in Canada longer. It doesn’t guarantee that you can leave and then re-enter Canada.
If you plan to travel outside Canada or the United States, you need a valid entry document, such as a visitor visa or an eTA, to return to Canada.
Find out what you need to travel to Canada .
